name: Overnight Blueberry Coffee Cake (Overnight)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the egg and 1/2 cup of sugar until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Gradually add the milk to the sugar mixture, alternating with the dry ingredients, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the melted butter.
5. Gently fold in the blueberries.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan and sprinkle the remaining sugar on top.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
8. Remove from the refrigerator about 30 minutes before baking.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
